productName: Const Rosin AIO Hype 2.0 Device Honey Combz 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Honey Combz oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, a smooth, sweet honey flavor, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
